offer.what: Adventure travel experiences — tours, trips, and travel packages (specific offerings not publicly listed on site as of research date; site is in early/placeholder stage)
offer.coreOutcome: Experiencing meaningful, memorable adventure travel in a way that feels personally curated and exciting
offer.pricePoint: unknown — no pricing listed on site
offer.commitment: unknown — likely per-trip/project-based rather than subscription; no recurring model visible
leadMagnets: Email list signup for 'updates, promotions, and more' (checkbox on contact form)

audience.icp: Adventure-seeking travelers (likely 25–55) who want guided or curated travel experiences beyond generic package tours; exact demographic/psychographic detail unknown from site
painPoints: Overwhelmed by DIY travel planning for adventure destinations
Uncertainty about safety and logistics for adventure travel
Generic tours that don't match personal interests or fitness level
segments: Small groups / friend groups planning trips
unknown — no segment data on site

salesCycle.length: weeks to months (travel planning cycle typical for the vertical)
salesCycle.trial: none visible — no free consult, demo, or sample trip offered on site
salesCycle.closeMechanism: contact form inquiry (only CTA on site); booking process unknown beyond initial inquiry
salesCycle.topObjection: unknown — likely cost/value vs. DIY booking or trust in a new/unknown operator

ahaMoment: Receiving a confirmed itinerary and knowing the trip is fully planned — the moment the customer stops worrying and starts anticipating

retention.recurring: unknown — likely repeat bookings per trip rather than subscription; no recurring model visible
retention.expansion: Upsell to larger trips, group bookings, or premium experiences (inferred from vertical norms)
retention.churnRisk: High if no follow-up after trip; customers may default to booking next trip elsewhere without a relationship-nurturing email program

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & Onboarding — no visible sequence for new email subscribers
Lead-Magnet Nurture — no dedicated lead magnet exists yet beyond generic email signup
Trial/Consult Conversion — no free consult or sample offer to convert subscribers
Booking Confirmation & Reminders — no visible pre-trip communication flow
Value Newsletter — no content/blog to establish expertise
Renewal / Post-Trip Re-Engagement — no visible repeat-booking or anniversary sequence
Win-Back / Re-Engagement — no visible reactivation campaign
Referral / Advocacy — no visible referral program
toneVoice: Casual, warm, and aspirational — invites exploration without being pushy; hero copy ('Explore Your Next Adventure') is short, punchy, and emotionally resonant; overall feel is inspirational and accessible rather than luxury or extreme
compliance: Standard CAN-SPAM / CASL compliance expected; no indicators of HIPAA, financial, or GDPR-specific constraints; site uses Google reCAPTCHA on contact form
